open_issues.note: Cores avg 12-47 LH @11min (humans 60-80). Engine CS is best available (OHA custom micro measured WORSE, C3 -3.6k). Real gains need proper attack-timing CS micro. Biggest econ lever.
Teams collect only ~43% of spawned lane gold; crude role-split caps measured neutral (C10/B1 reverted). Needs real lane-assignment soak logic (who rotates to which empty lane).
DK 218gpm/12LH, PA 228, SB 239, slardar 249 vs sniper 431 @10min — per-hero early-game rework is the big tail. Matches the project's focus-hero polish direction.

Owner observation (live watching iter-0004): bots' fight willingness seems weak and push tempo slower than human games — no proactive 'take tower after won fight' linkage, no dedicated push strategy. Long-term per-hero/macro polish item, not a blocker for this stage.
Pre-fix losing side did ~0 building dmg. If this persists with fair drafts (post iter-0001 cohort), hunt a defend-lock in mode desires beyond the fixed gates.
All games flag GetDesire hotspots, max ~7ms (sniper/CM/lion/PA/slardar...). Frame-budget risk; profile after macro fixes settle.
~74/game engine rejections: orders on dead units (order 19/20). Sloppy target validation, low priority.
Pre-fix feeder/low_gpm stats (lich 55K/207D etc.) all confounded by rigged draft. Re-rank from post-iter-0002 games.

CLOSED-as-explained: engine error handler is broken in this env — ALL Lua error text is masked ('error in error handling'), print() never reaches logs, so log-based unmasking is impossible. Debugging real errors needs in-game observation or bisection. Was open_issues:vscript_errors:masked.

iter-0001.note: remote tag push blocked by env git proxy; tag exists on farm checkout + locally. Farm loops restarted for version-stamp provenance.

iter-0004.note: push caps 0.85/0.95 + closing urgency (turbo>25min). Farm fully restarted on iter-0004 per owner; in-flight iter-0002/0003 games sacrificed. 35-min wall backstop + 40-min overtime forfeit both active. Score from run_20260719_0716: first-rax <28min, most games 25-35min.

iter-0006.note: tower-aggro yo-yo fix + 5-min turbo early game (4c723d1). Same run prefix soak/run_20260719_0741; cohort split by script_version stamp (iter-0005 / iter-0005-2-g* / iter-0006).

iter-0010.note: clean baseline after ten-min lab; B1 reverted; all lab gates inert. Lab summary in iterations/0008-ten-min-lab/REPORT.md

pending_validations: NEXT final gate: re-narrowed lanefix bundle (retreat guards + mana/salve/rescue/revive/threat + narrowed recover/support, NO undertower). Run only after owner sees the reject analysis; ~$1.

pending_behavioral_checks.note: Warlock laning build (Shadow Word first) + no Upheaval self-channel into creeps; verify Warlock level/GPM at 10min + no lane-shove before ungating
run collector ~07:05 UTC after ~10 slot1 replays; sandwiched_walk cand<base = win; watch kill participation
confirm Venge overextend drops in next batch; revert if it kills Venge fight participation

even_fight_deaths_NOT_a_bug: report_card death class 'even_fight' dominates (15/game), but per-game kill trades are LOPSIDED (16-8, 15-3, 9-14) = normal snowball, and both sides run identical mirror code so neither systematically loses even fights. Verified NOT a bug via trade-ratio check; do not re-chase. Reinforces why single-game econ is noise -> mirrored A/B (cancels snowball) is the right tool.

replay_mining_20260721.source: run spot_20260721_151005 (pre-session-fix baseline), 5 slot1 replays dumped+detected LOCALLY (built behav-dump via manta v1.5.0 in scratchpad)
replay_mining_20260721.conclusion: NO new un-addressed bug surfaced. Every high-frequency behavior already has a gated/shipped fix: sandwiched_walk->nodive2(#4), tp_under_threat->tpsafe2(#9, general, confirmed catches the ranged/8%HP cases), overextend_alone->#6/#18/aegisgroup, unpunished_tower_dive->#7(shipped, still fires->punish gate may be too strict), return_to_death_spot->#17/lf_revive, idle_while_ally_dies->#5, overchase->#20. Focus-hero signal = CM 6 deaths/5gm (known cm_conclusion pattern, covered by lf_salve+retreat). d20 detector CONFIRMED firing on real replays (1.0/game).
replay_mining_20260721.use: these are the BEFORE numbers; when the validation-run candidate-side replays land, compare detector rates to measure Class-B behavior deltas (not just econ verdict).
replay_mining_20260721.followup_note: unpunished_tower_dive still 4.6/game despite #7 being shipped -> worth checking whether J.ShouldPunishDive's numbers gate is too conservative in turbo (candidate for a future narrow loosening).

validation_run_20260721_2147.note: All self-terminate at 2h (or on validate completion, or spot reclaim). Check_costs after. Analyze verdicts + run behavioral detectors on candidate-side replays.

open_questions: SPOT RECLAMATION at ~07:00: both validation/replay spots gone (0 instances, no leak). Re-run: depthnum (Class-A --validate), nodive2 (behavioral), nopush/suplh/warlock queued.
Lesson: spot reclamation interrupts time-sensitive validation; --validate self-terminate handles cost but not reclaim. Consider on-demand for short validations or retry-on-reclaim.

workflow.loop: observe frame-by-frame -> find concrete bad decision -> narrow gated fix -> replay-fixture local validation (mandatory) -> accumulate ~10 -> ONE batch A/B final gate
rules: simulator is NEVER the per-change validator (lanefix bundle straight-to-sim was rejected 0/4; per-fix isolation batches were killed as waste)
fixtures: make_fixture.py + tests/mock/replay_fixture.lua run REAL jmz helpers on REAL frames, no J.* stubs
autonomous mode is owner-toggled; heartbeat = background sleep (in-memory cron dies on suspend)

lanefix.status: 10 fixes (9 gated lf_* + 1 promoted-path parity bugfix), ALL fixture-validated; FINAL-GATE batch running

fixes.lf_chase: ShouldNotChaseWhenLow REWRITTEN by fixture f_071423_luna_chase (numbers-parity exemption counted the dying bot as a fighter); generic seam wired in mode_retreat_generic + PA/SB considers
fixes.lf_mana: ShouldConserveManaInLane; fixture f_072738_zuus_mana; wired Zeus Q/W, Lion Q, CM Q
fixes.lf_support: keep support in lane + screen carry (GetLaneCoreToProtect); fixtures f_071859_oracle_screen/wandered; mode_laning_generic
fixes.lf_rescue: GetRescueTpTarget rescue/counter-gank TP; fixture f_071423_sky_rescue; wired tpscroll consider
fixes.lf_recover: ShouldLaneRecoverFarm unlocks laning-phase farm for zoned-off cores (root cause: blanket farm ban); fixture f_071903_sven_idle; mode_farm_generic
fixes.lf_revive: ShouldFleeAfterRevive: WK reincarnates in place 1v2 and re-feeds (080225 6:37->6:50, 11:00->11:12); numbers-based; fixture f_080225_wk_revive
fixes.lf_threat: NoteProvenKillerOnDeath + ShouldRespectProvenKiller: Zeus 100-0d by same Lina 4x (073148); memory-based distance-keeping; fixture f_073148_zuus_lina
fixes.promoted_parity: ShouldSuppressDive: parity may not exempt a <35%-HP bot unless kill secured without it (f_080225_wk_lane, WK 13% read as full 2v2 fighter); UNGATED bugfix of documented intent
fixes.lf_undertower: core active last-hit (c3 Think) re-armed under lanefix; motivated by present-vs-absent split (198/211 tower-killed creeps had a hero within 1400). NOT in the currently running final-gate batch (committed after launch) -> rides the NEXT batch; yardstick = d9 missed_cs_at_tower.

lanefix.bundle_verdict: lanefix 4-fix bundle REJECTED by mirrored A/B (gpm -74.5, xpm -84.7, deaths +1.0, 0/4 comps) BEFORE the fixture stage existed; fixes since rewritten/expanded under fixture validation; re-batch only after ~10 accumulated
lanefix.batch_budget_note: MTD ~$59; owner approval line $100; next batch is ONE final-gate run

final_gate_verdict.verdict: REJECT (2nd): gpm -88.7, xpm -89.3, deaths +0.67, last_hits -8.22, 0/4 comps on every metric (lanefix_20260721_1511.verdict.json, 228 games)
final_gate_verdict.read: CORRECTED by behavioral diff on the batch replays + deploy-timeline check: PRIMARY culprit = lf_recover (cand cores spent 19% of laning off-lane vs 10% base; ">2500 from front POINT" also matched the ordinary base->lane walk, so farm-mode pulled low-level cores into jungle: CS@8 -48%, laning deaths +40%). SECONDARY = lf_support clumping (17/17 games, pairwise dist -23%; supports parked ON the carry). Retreat guards EXONERATED on econ (overextend -75%, sandwiched -26%, oscillation only +6%). NOTE: subagent initially blamed lf_undertower, but deploy_wave never re-pulls git and the undertower commit (15:40:56Z) postdates the boot pull (~15:11) -- it was NOT in the batch.
final_gate_verdict.note: promoted-parity change shipped BOTH sides (symmetric, not part of the diff). lf_undertower was NOT in this batch.
final_gate_verdict.next: NO isolation batches. Cheap path: behavioral diff on THIS batch's own replays (candidate side vs baseline side) with detectors/report cards to find which behaviors actually shifted; then narrow thresholds at the fixture level (e.g. chase guard only when target is FLEEING; threat guard radius down; support screen only when carry is contested). Re-batch only after a re-narrowed set.

narrowing.lf_recover: now requires off the LANE PATH too (min dist to sampled GetLocationAlongLane points > 1500) + HP >= 50%; Sven motivating frame still fires; on-path-walk and low-HP counterfactuals pinned in test_replay_071903_sven_idle
narrowing.lf_support: screen only when an enemy hero is within 1600 of the carry, and stand 400u OFF the carry toward own fountain (no more parking on top)
narrowing.lf_undertower: PARKED outside the lanefix bundle -- wholesale Valve-CS-think replacement must be evaluated on its own candidate, never silently inside a bundle

tooling.replayscope: tools/batch_test/replayscope/ (build.py page per replay, make_fixture.py decision fixtures)
tooling.known_gap: dumper drops creep deaths not killed by heroes -> missed-CS/deny analysis inexact; planned: emit all creep deaths + d9_missed_cs detector

full_keystone: DONE: replay time-slice -> full hero script (SkillsComplement) with real ability levels/cds, roster-backed GetNearbyHeroes, action recorder; e2e regression test_replay_072738_zuus_script.lua

autopsies.cm_conclusion: CM 2.8 deaths/gm; recurring pattern = hanging in lane at <=52% HP (covered by lf_salve + retreat guards). Creep-caused deaths are 2/25 games -> deliberately NOT fixed (too rare).
autopsies.lion_conclusion: Lion 2.3 deaths/gm, 0 solo deaths in 3 games -> no distinct pattern beyond existing guards; low priority.

missed_cs: dumper keeps lane-creep deaths from any killer; d9 live. 071903: ~48% lane farm uncollected; 94% of tower-kills happen with a hero present -> fix = lf_undertower (re-armed c3 core LH).
divecap_finding: ROOT CAUSE of unpunished_tower_dive staying 4.6/game despite #7 shipped: mode_team_roam CapForLanePush soft-ceils any roam desire >0.9 to 0.72 during laning; the tower-dive(#7)/over-chase(#20) punish return 0.98, so in the laning phase (when most dives happen) the punish was capped below the bot's laning desire and never fired. Fix (gated 'divecap'): defensive-collapse desires bypass the lane cap. A/B QUEUED behind spot capacity (c6i+c6a both InsufficientInstanceCapacity at 4 running); retry when a validate instance frees. VERIFY = unpunished_tower_dive rate on divecap-armed replays vs 4.6 baseline. Help-ally branches deliberately NOT exempted (3500u search radius = legit roam, correctly capped).
new_gated_notes: Implemented+unit-tested+on main, inert (gated). Need A/B/behavioral validation before promote: skysilence(#9 skywrath lone-silence), overchase(#20 punish enemy overchase), tpsafe2(#9 slardar interruptible-TP), midtp(#15 mid TP tower support), aegisgroup(#6 no solo-dive with aegis), pullcamp(#13 pull neutral camps for lane equilibrium), creeppull(#10 disadvantaged core draws enemy-creep aggro to reset lane), bodyblock(#11 advantaged laning core harasses enemy on a winnable trade), wkbuild(#17 WK earlier-2nd-stun skill build for kill participation).
backlog_status_20260721: ALL fixable open issues now carry a gated or shipped implementation. Lane-control cluster #8 (children #10 creeppull, #11 bodyblock, #12 nopush[gated], #13 pullcamp, #14 suplh[gated], #15 midtp) COMPLETE. #6 aegisgroup, #9 (skysilence/wlok/tpsafe2), #17 wkbuild, #19 vsafe[shipped], #20 overchase all done. Remaining work is PURE A/B VALIDATION (owner-deferred: '先不急着跑模拟器'): promote the ~11 gated candidates one lever at a time + the #21 lanefix re-narrowed rerun. Class-A-only items not doable under local-test-only: #16 corefarm[REJECTED], #18 depthnum[gated, needs multi-seed], #19 general attack/roam overextend expansion.
